columns.name: kilde
columns.description: The source of the inventory data

columns.name: periode
columns.description: The period for which the inventory data is valid

columns.name: avdnr
columns.description: The location number where the inventory is recorded

columns.name: fknr
columns.description: The product number associated with the inventory record

columns.name: lagersted
columns.description: The warehouse identifier where the inventory is stored

columns.name: plasnr
columns.description: The storage location within the warehouse

columns.name: kgrad
columns.description: The grade or category of the inventory item

columns.name: beholdning
columns.description: The current quantity of the inventory item

columns.name: regdato
columns.description: The date when the inventory record was registered

columns.name: sisteSalgDato
columns.description: The last sale date of the inventory item

columns.name: sisteInnDato
columns.description: The last incoming date of the inventory item

columns.name: tidspunkt
columns.description: The timestamp when the inventory record was updated

columns.name: sistPlukkPartinr
columns.description: The part number of the last picked item in this location

columns.name: iordre
columns.description: The quantity ordered for the product

columns.name: ibestilling
columns.description: The quantity to be reordered for the product

columns.name: avdkost
columns.description: The average cost of the inventory item

columns.name: reservert
columns.description: The quantity reserved for specific purposes

columns.name: varegr
columns.description: The product group to which the inventory item belongs

columns.name: system
columns.description: The code of the system from which the data is sourced

columns.name: antEnhetsnr
columns.description: The number of units associated with the inventory item

columns.name: partivare
columns.description: Indicates if the item is part of the inventory

columns.name: eksportert
columns.description: The timestamp when the record was exported

columns.name: filnr
columns.description: The file number associated with the inventory data

columns.name: partistyringD365fo
columns.description: Indicates if D365 is managing the inventory for this product

columns.name: enhetsnr
columns.description: The unit number associated with the inventory item

columns.name: eiernr
columns.description: The owner number of the inventory item
